package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for pgxpool_ping_per_request: Per-request pgxpool connectivity probes that add latency outside health-check boundaries.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: info.
type Rule282NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario282Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule282NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
